response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source contributions, and exposure to agentic workflows and real-time systems, but lacks clear evidence of 5+ years in senior technical leadership at scale-ups, direct fintech infrastructure experience, or production multi-agent AI systems in regulated environments — key requirements for this CTO role.
strengths: Demonstrated hands-on work with agentic workflows and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Proven experience building event-driven, scalable systems (e.g., GISCollective, DLang microservices)
Strong engineering culture advocacy via workshops, TDD, CI/CD, and open-source tooling
concerns: No clear evidence of leading engineering teams from 10 to 30+ people in a scale-up
Lacks documented experience in fintech infrastructure, credit risk, or regulated AI deployment
No mention of multi-agent architecture design, observability for agents, or model-agnostic LLM infrastructure
